characters: Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
Heretic Questioner (as Lady of Golden Silk)
events: Gongja officially chooses to stay with Lady of Silver Lily
Lady of Silver Lily reveals she has tried 14 times (140 days) to set the prince straight
She explains the regression problem: whoever dies first regresses first, causing memory loss for the other
Gongja proposes they die together to synchronize their regressions
Lady of Silver Lily agrees to fake-date Gongja to spite the prince
Gongja calls her by name: Raviel Ivansia
Immersion rate reaches 50%
cause_effect: Parallel regression lines cannot meet unless they die simultaneously
The fake relationship is agreed upon for mutual benefit and spite
Gongja's confession of being a regressor creates a bond between them
The prince's abandonment of Raviel makes her willing to try a different path
chapters.notes: Raviel calls Gongja by his real name for the first time. The chapter establishes the central problem of the arc: how to synchronize two different regression timelines.

characters: Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
events: Gongja checks his status: 6 skills including Infernal Heavens Demonic Art (A+)
He sees his character window: Favorability 90, loves [Justice Prevails, Friendship, Love]
He sets Maginot Line at 99% immersion - Bae Hu-ryeong must stop him if he approaches
Lady of Silver Lily is sick in bed - always been infirm, worse after heart was stabbed
Gongja makes her honey tea and gives her rest
He kills blood demons every night to let her rest
On the 10th day, the world ends with blood and demon invasion
Gongja proposes they die together with aura explosions
deaths: Death King and Lady of Silver Lily (simultaneous suicide by aura explosion)
loops: Both regress - but Lady of Silver Lily goes back 9 days before Gongja
cause_effect: Gongja's strategy: simultaneous death should synchronize their timelines
The Lady of Silver Lily's 10-day cycle and Gongja's 24-hour cycle create a timing mismatch
Rest and care reduce her burden and build their relationship
The demons grow stronger each night until the world ends on day 10
chapters.notes: The 10th day is the world's end. Other Constellations' apostles appear: The Ox that Harvests Ruins, The Warhorse of the Eternal Plains, The Evangelist of Everlasting Happiness.

characters: Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
Heretic Questioner (as Lady of Golden Silk)
events: Gongja wakes up 9 days after Raviel - she has been waiting
They successfully synchronized their first joint regression
Raviel punishes Gongja for making her wait by making him serve tea
They hug and kiss - immersion rises to 71%
Gongja proposes they repeat this 9 more times to get closer to Day One
They die and regress together multiple times, each time getting closer
They finally reach Day One - the ballroom where they first met
They kiss publicly in the ballroom, shocking everyone
skills: Infernal Heavens Demonic Art - 9th form: Sword of Suicide
deaths: Death King and Lady of Silver Lily (multiple simultaneous deaths)
Various demon victims during the 10-day cycles
loops: Multiple synchronized regressions: 9 days, 8 days, 7 days... down to Day One
Final regression to Day One in the ballroom
cause_effect: Each synchronized death brings them closer to the starting point
The time gap between their regressions narrows with practice
Physical intimacy accelerates the synchronization process
Reaching Day One allows them to change the foundation of their relationship
chapters.notes: The chapter uses a montage format for the multiple loops. Gongja jokes about their names: Gongja (Confucius) and Gong-nyeo (noble lady) are a match. Heretic Questioner's immersion decreases as they approach Day One.

characters: Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
events: Gongja and Raviel kiss in the ballroom in front of everyone
Raviel submits withdrawal request from academy and breaks engagement with prince
Crown prince is shocked and unable to respond
Heretic Questioner tries to stop them but is dismissed
Gongja and Raviel leave the academy in a carriage
Raviel threatens to kill Gongja if he betrays her
She demands he never kill himself without permission
They confess their love and become official lovers
Gongja reveals Hundred Ghosts Reincarnation skill and promises not to use it on her
cause_effect: Publicly breaking the engagement forces the prince's hand
Raviel's threats show her fear of abandonment and love
The promises they make create binding rules for their relationship
Gongja's revelation of his skill shows complete trust
chapters.notes: Raviel is called 'Husband' (婦君 - female ruler) and Gongja is called 'Wife' (夫人). This is a reversal of traditional roles. The chapter establishes their relationship rules.

characters: Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
events: Gongja suggests a 10-day vacation before the world ends
Raviel suggests 15 days instead
They hire six theater groups simultaneously to create chaos
They clean out gambling houses and scatter gold in streets
They bribe guards to empty streets and cause mischief
Raviel smiles genuinely for the first time on the 3rd day
Gongja's immersion rises to 81%
Gongja reveals his plan: push immersion to 99% and exploit a loophole
loops: They regress each day to repeat their vacation
15 days of vacation through daily regressions
cause_effect: The vacation allows them to vent stress from their past lives
Raviel's genuine smile shows she is healing from her trauma
Gongja's plan requires complete trust from Raviel
The 99% immersion strategy is kept secret from everyone including Bae Hu-ryeong
chapters.notes: The chapter is lighthearted and shows their compatibility. Raviel enjoys causing chaos. They act like 'vicious bitches' together. The final day they sit quietly at a fountain.

characters: Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
events: Gongja explains the 99% immersion plan to Raviel
He realizes that skills remain even at high immersion - Heretic Questioner kept his transformation
Plan: Become 99% immersed as the butler, then regress from butler's perspective
This would take him back to before Raviel stabbed the mirror
Raviel agrees despite knowing she won't remember him
Gongja asks her to kill him at 99% immersion
She kisses him and immersion rises to 83%
The final run begins
loops: Final planned regression from butler's perspective
cause_effect: At 99% immersion, the 'owner' of the body is the butler, not Gongja
The skill belongs to the body, so the butler would inherit the regression
Regressing from butler's perspective means going back before the 10-day loop began
Raviel agrees to trust Gongja despite not understanding the full plan
chapters.notes: The strategy exploits the Tower's system error regarding skill ownership at high immersion. Raviel says: 'I've become your first bitch of a lover, and you'll be my last.'

characters: Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
events: Gongja's immersion rises: 85%, 87%, 88%, 89%, 90%
His memories begin disappearing - orphanage, Bae Hu-ryeong, Shiny
At 90%: Memories flood in, his existence weakens
At 95%: He forgets his own identity
At 99%: He becomes the butler completely
Raviel kills him with a rapier through the heart
She kisses him as he dies
Tower system error: 'Owner of skill different from user of skill'
Gongja is summoned before the Six Pillars of Manseng
Tower Master convenes meeting to judge the error
locations: Lady of Silver Lily's quarters (with mirror)
deaths: Death King (killed by Lady of Silver Lily at 99% immersion)
loops: Failed judgment: System cannot determine which timeline to regress to
cause_effect: High immersion causes memory overwrite by character
Raviel's killing of Gongja is part of the plan
The Tower encounters an unprecedented error
The Six Pillars are the administrators who must decide the outcome
chapters.notes: The chapter is emotionally intense as Gongja loses himself. Raviel's tears show her pain. The Tower refers to him as 'temporary apostle of Hamustra.' The Six Pillars: The Wand of Ages, The Lady Who Walks In The Mirage, The Moon Contemplating Blindness, The One Who Wrote The Beginning, The God Who Dances In The Void, and the Tower Master.

characters: Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
events: Tower Master asks Gongja to explain his actions
Gongja argues that the error is the Tower's fault, not his
He demands compensation and reward for discovering the error
He praises the Tower for being kind and wishing luck to climbers
The Tower Master is amused by his audacity
The Lady Who Walks In The Mirage and others show goodwill
Tower Master agrees to his request
Gongja asks for two things: regression from butler's perspective, and retention of Raviel's memories
Tower grants both requests
cause_effect: Gongja's argument: The Tower is at fault for the system error
His flattery of the Tower's kindness softens their stance
The reward system exists for those who find loopholes
Retaining Raviel's memories ensures their relationship survives the reset
chapters.notes: The Tower Master refers to themselves as 'lowly self' and speaks politely. The Tower is revealed to be a haven for the lonely and a well-wisher for climbers. Gongja's silver tongue successfully negotiates with god-like beings.

characters: Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
events: Extra chapter showing Raviel's perspective
Raviel ties up crown prince for 'remedial lessons'
Lesson 1: Only a scumbag cheats on his fiancee
She blackmails him with compromising photos
Gives photos to Lady of Golden Silk to create scandal
She waits for Gongja's regression for 6 days
Plays with 'Gongja 3' (current timeline version) while waiting
The real trauma: killing Gongja and waiting for his return
She wills herself to make the moment of his death her trauma
deaths: Ganja plant (overwatered by Raviel, nearly becomes her trauma)
cause_effect: Raviel takes proactive steps to change the timeline
Blackmailing the prince weakens his position
She deliberately embeds the killing as her trauma so Gongja will see her memories
The trauma becomes a message to the future Gongja
chapters.notes: This is an extra chapter (109.1) showing Raviel's side. Her love for Gongja drives her to extreme measures. The 'Ganja plant' death is a humorous moment showing her stress.

characters: Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
events: Raviel's perspective: killing Gongja to make it her trauma
She forces herself to feel the pain of losing him
She deliberately deepens the wound by imagining worst-case scenarios
Trauma reenactment complete - penalty is Hungry Ghost Road
Gongja's perspective: crying without knowing why
He finds himself walking to Raviel's mansion
Raviel waits for him - 'Today is the second'
She shows him a golden card: [A Regressor's Love]
The card synchronizes their timelines permanently
They reunite and confess their love
skills: [A Regressor's Love] - EX Rank skill that synchronizes regression timelines
deaths: Death King (from trauma reenactment, multiple times in the vision)
loops: Gongja regresses to 24 hours ago from butler's perspective
Raviel retains memories through the [A Regressor's Love] skill
cause_effect: Raviel's trauma becomes a message that survives the timeline reset
The EX skill [A Regressor's Love] is the reward from the Tower
Synchronized regression allows them to share the same timeline
Gongja's tears are his subconscious remembering her
chapters.notes: The [A Regressor's Love] card: 'For a regressor, love is like poison. No matter how much you struggle, you can't share your time with the one you love. Thus, a certain regressor begged, "Please retain my lover's memories." That wish reached the Tower and came true.'

characters: Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
events: Gongja and Raviel reunite and kiss
Gongja proposes marriage
Raviel accepts and reveals her full name and titles
They plan to break engagement with prince and marry in one month
Raviel becomes Duchess of Ivansia by confining her father
She arranges for Gongja to be adopted by grand chamberlain
Gongja becomes Duke Consort of Ivansia
They establish relationship rules and promises
cause_effect: Marriage requires political maneuvering due to Raviel's status
Becoming duchess gives Raviel power to marry whomever she chooses
Gongja's adoption elevates his status to match hers
Their love becomes official and recognized by the empire
chapters.notes: Raviel calls Gongja 'Wife' (夫人) and Gongja calls her 'Husband' (婦君 - female ruler). Raviel says if citizens don't recognize Gongja, she will kill them.

characters: Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
Lady of the Golden Silk (Sylvia Evanail)
events: Gongja tells Lady of Golden Silk he is marrying Raviel
She thinks it's a joke and stamps permission document
Raviel arrives with wedding invitation
Lady of Golden Silk is shocked - the Heretic Questioner is 90% immersed
Gongja and Raviel leave together affectionately
Raviel reveals she detained her father and became duchess
She arranges Gongja's adoption papers
Servants break jug and prostrate before Gongja
Gongja forgives them by making them wear the broken piece as necklace
cause_effect: The Lady of Golden Silk's disbelief shows the social gap between baron and duke
Raviel's political maneuvering is swift and ruthless
Gongja's handling of the servant incident shows wisdom
The broken jug necklace becomes a symbol of self-reflection
chapters.notes: The Heretic Questioner is still immersed as Lady of Golden Silk but shows moments of clarity. Raviel's power is absolute - even academy teachers bow to Gongja as consort.

characters: Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
events: Heretic Questioner explains Constellation laws and sanctuaries
Demonstrates Barbit's sanctuary (romantic comedy effects)
Identifies three attacking Constellations: Mutia, Mahos, and unknown
Guardian Goddess is revealed as Hwiya (Protection and Immortality)
Raviel and Heretic Questioner plan wedding security
Gongja trains to improve his fighting ability
Ten days pass quickly
Wedding day arrives - guests assemble
cause_effect: Understanding Constellation laws is key to defeating apostles
Physical attacks work on physical bodies regardless of world
Each apostle has different strengths: 1v1, army, mental
The wedding is set as the battleground
chapters.notes: Heretic Questioner explains that Earth (physics-based) is actually weak compared to other worlds. The wedding will be held on the day the world originally ended.

characters: Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
Heretic Questioner (as Lady of Golden Silk)
Apostle of Ox that Harvests Ruins (Lady of Golden Silk's noumenon)
Apostle of Warhorse of the Eternal Plains (general on pegasus)
Apostle of Evangelist of Everlasting Happiness (singing children)
events: Wedding hall attacked by three apostles
Golden Silk apostle has invulnerable body (99.9% damage reduction)
Warhorse apostle summons 10,000 ghost soldiers
Happiness apostle forces people into happy memories (psychological attack)
Raviel organizes defense with special operatives and knights
Heretic Questioner analyzes apostle abilities
Grand Chamberlain (adoptive father) is killed by Golden Silk apostle
Gongja asks Raviel's permission to die - she grants it
They die together by hammer strike, maintaining hand-hold for synchronized regression
deaths: Multiple wedding guests (killed by ghosts and hammer)
Lady of Silver Lily (crushed by hammer)
loops: Synchronized death and regression back 24 hours
cause_effect: The apostles' combined abilities create an impossible situation
The invulnerable body cannot be damaged by normal means
The army of ghosts overwhelms their forces
The psychological attack incapacitates most defenders
Synchronized death allows them to retry with foreknowledge
chapters.notes: The wedding dress code: Raviel wears black (family head) and Gongja wears white (consort). The Golden Silk apostle is the 'noumenon' - the Lady of Golden Silk's soul given entirely to the Constellation.

characters: Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
Lady of the Golden Silk (Sylvia Evanail)
events: Gongja and Raviel wake up holding hands 24 hours before wedding
They plan new strategy with foreknowledge of apostle positions
Heretic Questioner explains happiness apostle's danger
Gongja requests to wear black instead of white
They rearrange wedding seating: fighters in front, nobles in back
Heretic Questioner uses Sacred Technique: Divine Transmission to teleport
Gongja attacks Golden Silk apostle from behind in the sky
He uses Compassion Sword to inflict pain despite invulnerable body
Golden Silk apostle screams and falls
Gongja summons Preta and Hundred Ghosts to counter the ghost army
locations: Wedding hall (day before and wedding day)
skills: Hundred Ghosts Reincarnation (summons Preta and cult members)
loops: Second attempt at wedding battle with foreknowledge
cause_effect: Foreknowledge allows them to position fighters optimally
Teleportation negates the element of surprise from apostles
Compassion Sword bypasses physical immunity by causing pain directly
Hundred Ghosts Reincarnation provides army to counter ghost soldiers
The black cape signifies Gongja's role as family head for the battle
chapters.notes: The chapter ends with the battle beginning. Gongja uses his full skillset: Compassion Sword, teleportation with Heretic Questioner, and Hundred Ghosts. The wedding becomes a 'Black Wedding' - a battle for the world's survival.
